query: ok so I've been dumping stuff into my backlog all week and it's getting out of hand — can you go through it and figure out what's actually actionable vs what's just notes I jotted down during meetings?
I need to triage my backlog. There's like 15 items in there from the last sprint planning, some are tasks, some are half-baked ideas. Can you categorize them and tell me what to prioritize?
/process-backlog
clean up the backlog please — I think there are duplicates and some stuff that's already done
organize my brain dump. I just threw a bunch of stuff in BACKLOG.md after my 1:1 with Jamie and I need it sorted into tasks and initiatives
hey can you look at BACKLOG.md and process everything in there? separate out the references from the actual work items and flag anything that's vague

I added 'investigate slow API response times for /v2/merchants endpoint' and 'look into enterprise SSO options' to the backlog yesterday. Can you triage those and check if they overlap with anything we already have?
my backlog has gotten messy — there's a mix of bugs, strategic ideas, and random links I saved. Can you go through it, deduplicate, and present what you find before creating anything?
I've got about 8 items in my brain dump from this week. Some need to become P1 tasks, some are probably P3 or just references. Process them and check priority caps before suggesting priorities.
triage the backlog and link everything to goals from GOALS.md. Flag anything that doesn't fit a current goal so I can decide if it matters.
what tasks are due this week? show me my upcoming deadlines
show me all my P0 tasks right now
create a new task called 'Review Q1 metrics dashboard' with priority P2 and category strategy
can you mark the task fix-login-auth-bug.md as done? I just shipped the fix
write a PRD for the new merchant onboarding flow — I want sections for problem statement, proposed solution, success metrics, and timeline
search my meeting notes for any mentions of the Stripe integration timeline that Jamie discussed last Thursday
I need to draft an email to the engineering team about the upcoming API deprecation schedule. Keep it concise and professional.
can you look at our conversion metrics in BigQuery for the last 30 days and tell me if there's been a drop in mobile checkout completion?
set up my product OS workspace — I need the folder structure, config files, and GOALS.md template
summarize the key decisions from my last 3 meetings with the payments team and put them in knowledge/references/
